name: tegliata di biete
instructions: boil chard in salted water 5-10 min, drain, cool, squeeze very dry, chop fine. cook onion in olive oil ~15 min until golden. add chard, cook briefly on high. off heat, mix in parm, beaten eggs, pine nuts, raisins, salt, pepper. pack into oiled breadcrumbed pan, top with breadcrumbs + oil. bake ~40 min until set and browned.
notes: marcella hazan, essentials of classic italian cooking. swiss chard torte with raisins and pine nuts — venetian, near-east trade influence. quantities: 2.5 lb young chard (or 3.25 lb mature), 1/4 cup olive oil + more for greasing/topping, 2/3 cup chopped onion, 1 cup grated parm, 2 eggs, 1/4 cup pine nuts, 1/3 cup raisins, breadcrumbs.
